option.name: originalContent
option.value: { "name": "ovalinfo-premium", "version": "1.0.0", "private": true, "type": "module", "scripts": { "dev": "vite", "build": "vite build", "preview": "vite preview", "predeploy": "npm run build", "deploy": "gh-pages -d dist" }, "dependencies": { "framer-motion": "^11.0.0", "mermaid": "^10.9.0", "react": "^18.2.0", "react-dom": "^18.2.0", "react-router-dom": "^6.22.0", "recharts": "^2.12.0" }, "devDependencies": { "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^4.2.0", "autoprefixer": "^10.4.17", "gh-pages": "^6.1.1", "postcss": "^8.4.35", "tailwindcss": "^3.4.1", "vite": "^5.1.0" } }

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: { "name": "ovalinfo-premium", "version": "1.0.0", "private": true, "type": "module", "scripts": { "dev": "vite", "build": "vite build", "preview": "vite preview", "predeploy": "npm run build", "deploy": "rm -rf /tmp/gh-deploy && mkdir /tmp/gh-deploy && cp -r dist/. /tmp/gh-deploy/ && cd /tmp/gh-deploy && git init && git checkout -b gh-pages && git add -A && git commit -m 'Deploy' && git remote add origin git@github.com:damiandragowski/ovalinfo.git && git push origin gh-pages --force" }, "dependencies": { "framer-motion": "^11.0.0", "mermaid": "^10.9.0", "react": "^18.2.0", "react-dom": "^18.2.0", "react-router-dom": "^6.22.0", "recharts": "^2.12.0" }, "devDependencies": { "@vitejs/plugin-react": "^4.2.0", "autoprefixer": "^10.4.17", "gh-pages": "^6.1.1", "postcss": "^8.4.35", "tailwindcss": "^3.4.1", "vite": "^5.1.0" } }

option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
